task.title: Removing a file from an MVS subproject
task.shortdesc: The Remove from Subproject action removes a data set or partitioned data set member from a subproject but does not delete it from the remote system.

keywords.indexterm: MVS subprojectRemoving a partitioned data set member
subproject, MVSRemoving a partitioned data set member

context.note: If you added a partitioned data set member to a subproject, you can remove it individually. If you added the entire partitioned data set, you cannot remove individual members of the partitioned data set.

steps.stepsection: To remove a resource from a subproject:

step.cmd: In the view, select the resource that you want to remove.
Right-click and select Remove from Subproject.
When prompted to confirm the action, click Yes.
